programmes.show_description: James Fairweather. 15-year-old James Fairweather terrorised a local community with random deadly attacks that left two people dead. What made him carry out such brutal murders? S1, Ep3
Kim Edwards / Lucas Markham. Teen lovers Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were convicted of murdering her mum, Elizabeth and younger sister, Katie in April 2016. What led them to kill? S1, Ep4
The Other Man. In 2014, a student from China is found murdered in Iowa. CCTV footage points to a planned execution and it opens an international investigation. S8, Ep11
Someone You Trust. When 8-year-old Sandra doesn't return home, her family report her as missing. What police discover on CCTV is every mother's worst nightmare. S8, Ep12

Fatal Error. Tiny evidence helps bring to justice a murderer who stabbed two young women to death. Plus, the search for the identity of a woman found decapitated. S5, Ep11
Scent Of A Killer. Discover how a killer can try to cover his tracks, but evidence is hard to conceal when a special breed of investigative dog picks up the scent. S5, Ep13
Broken Trust. Greed was the main motivation for the Prince Brothers' killings, firstly for money, then to get rid of those they believed could incriminate them. S5, Ep15
Criminal Enterprise. A masked gunman robs a California bank and escapes after a standoff with police. Months later, when a jeweller is robbed and kidnapped, a tip links the crimes. S5, Ep16
MV Bianca And Bryony Hollands. Judge Rinder examines a police attempt to intercept a record-breaking shipment of cocaine. Plus, he looks at a drunk-driving incident. S3, Ep7
Murder In The Mortuary. Julie Bowling is a respected cancer therapist and funeral home worker. When she is murdered the focus turns to her husband's secret life and shaky finances. S4, Ep4

Mr. Reed Will See You. Keith Reed is found gunned down on his doorstep. A possible crime of passion is in doubt after a surprise discovery. Will CCTV footage unravel the mystery? S2, Ep12
Screaming Terror. When Alice Hufnagle is raped and murdered in 2002, police initially question her estranged husband. But, clues eventually lead to her colleague at a local pharmacy. S2, Ep4
Watch Your Back. US Air Force sergeant Nathan Paet and his family appear to live a blissfully normal life - until a horrific attack leads to their destruction. S3, Ep2
Stages Of Grief. In California, an intruder brutally attacks and kills Joan Dawley. Secret home movies uncover a shocking tale of deceit, and a monster lurking behind the scenes. S3, Ep3

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: Goodbye Horses. On Chincoteague Island, a young mother is murdered steps from a vacant summer home. Det. Danny Plott learns she was lured to her death by a mysterious phone call. S1, Ep5
Judge Rinder shines a light on Britain's worst crimes with unprecedented access to court records, witness interviews, and dramatic reconstructions. S4, Ep2
The Landlady. The brutal murder of an elderly landlady offers no forensic answers. Detectives try to find a lead by studying security footage of her final days. S6, Ep19

programmes.show_name: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: Pathologically Evil. After four women vanish and their cases go cold for decades, Texas Ranger Jim Holland must bond with a serial killer to pry loose the truth. S1, Ep1

Joshua Davies. 16-year-old Joshua Davies was sentenced to 14 years in jail for the murder of his on-off girlfriend. Why did he kill - and only confess to it in prison? S1, Ep5
Laundrette Killers. In 2013, Sean McHugh, went to a laundrette in Anfield, Liverpool to do his washing, only to be stabbed by a teenage gang. What made them kill an innocent man? S1, Ep6

Stolen Identity. A woman, Betty, identifies a dead body as her missing sister Annie - but Annie is still alive. A look at murderers who kill to acquire a new identity. S6, Ep4
Texas Rangers. Examines the history and modern evolution of the Texas Rangers, who were formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against attacks from natives. S3, Ep11
Fateful Crossing. When an officer dies in the line of duty, the fraternity of law enforcement bands together to make sure that justice is brought to those responsible. S5, Ep17
